www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.q: When is the 12th Aditya-L1 Support Cell (AL1SC) Workshop at IIT Jammu?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.a: The workshop is scheduled from December 22–24, 2025.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.q: Where is the 12th Aditya-L1 Support Cell (AL1SC) Workshop at IIT Jammu being held?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.a: The workshop is being held at the Jagti (Main) Campus of IIT Jammu.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.q: Who is jointly organizing the 12th Aditya-L1 Support Cell (AL1SC) Workshop at IIT Jammu?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.a: The workshop is jointly organized by ISRO and ARIES.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.q: What is the focus of the 12th Aditya-L1 Support Cell (AL1SC) Workshop at IIT Jammu?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.a: The workshop focuses on advancing research and capacity building in solar physics and heliophysics.
India’s Aditya-L1 mission is the nation’s first dedicated mission to study the Sun.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.q: When was India’s Aditya-L1 mission launched?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.a: India’s Aditya-L1 mission was launched in January 2024.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.q: Where is the Aditya-L1 mission positioned?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.a: The Aditya-L1 mission is positioned in a halo orbit around the Lagrange Point 1 (L1).

www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.q: What is the aim of the Aditya-L1 mission?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.a: The mission aims to deepen our understanding of solar dynamics and their influence on space weather.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.q: Who will be giving expert lectures at the workshop?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.a: Expert lectures will be given by scientists from ISRO and ARIES.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.q: What is the target audience for the 12th Aditya-L1 Support Cell (AL1SC) Workshop at IIT Jammu?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__post__twelfth-aditya.a: The workshop is designed for students and early-career researchers.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__st-sc-cell.md.a: The SC/ST Students Cell addresses academic and non-academic issues and complaints received from students in reserved categories.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__st-sc-cell.md.q: What is the main goal of the SC/ST Cell?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__st-sc-cell.md.a: The institute strives to maintain an environment where all communities can participate in academic and research activities without any sort of discrimination with respect to caste or creed.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__st-sc-cell.md.q: Who should report incidents of caste-based discrimination?

www.iitjammu.ac.in__st-sc-cell.md.q: What should officials, faculty, and staff members avoid doing?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__st-sc-cell.md.a: They should desist from any act of discrimination against SC/ST students on the grounds of their social origin.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__st-sc-cell.md.q: What should all stakeholders be more sensitive about?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__st-sc-cell.md.a: All stakeholders should be more sensitive while dealing with incidents of caste discrimination.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.q: What is the mission of IIT Jammu Tinkering Lab?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.a: The mission of IIT Jammu Tinkering Lab is to create workspaces where young minds can learn innovation skills, sculpt their ideas through hands-on activities, social and cross-cultural collaboration, and ethical leadership. It aims to transform imagination into reality and promote Atma Nirbhar Bharat.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.q: What skills does the Tinkering Lab aim to nurture?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.a: The Tinkering Lab aims to nurture skills such as complex problem solving, creative thinking, entrepreneurial skills, adaptive thinking, and computational skills.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.q: How large is the Tinkering Lab?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.a: The Tinkering Lab currently occupies 1800 sq. ft. of area.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.q: Where is the Tinkering Lab located?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.a: The Tinkering Lab is located in the institute's academics block.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.q: What are the operating hours of the Tinkering Lab?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.a: The Tinkering Lab is open 24*7 for students and faculty members.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.q: How far is the Tinkering Lab from the student hostels?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.a: The Tinkering Lab is located at an optimum distance of 170 meters from the student hostels.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.q: How long does it take for students to reach the Tinkering Lab from their hostels?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.a: It takes 5-10 minutes for students to reach the Tinkering Lab from their hostels.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.q: What is the proximity of the Tinkering Lab to classrooms and faculty offices?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.a: The Tinkering Lab is in close proximity to classrooms and faculty offices.

www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.q: What is the future development plan for the Tinkering Lab?
www.iitjammu.ac.in__tinkerers-lab.md.a: IIT Jammu is developing a new facility within the next 18 months, with around 8000 - 10000 sq ft earmarked for the Institute Innovation & Entrepreneurship Development Center. The Tinkering Lab will be a significant part of this center.
